summary: Verified bug fixes for sign-up form multi-select validation in 'The Becoming' website. Both critical bugs have been fixed: 1) Users can now proceed past 'creativeExpression' multi-select step, 2) All mandatory field validations working correctly. Full 13-step form flow tested end-to-end successfully.

bug_1_creativeExpression_multi_select.description: Users could not get past the 'creative interests' (creativeExpression) step
bug_1_creativeExpression_multi_select.root_cause: Missing validation logic for 'multi' type questions in canProceed()
bug_1_creativeExpression_multi_select.test_result: PASS - Validation shows 'Please select at least one option.' and user can proceed after selecting

bug_2_all_questions_mandatory.description: All questions in the form needed to be made mandatory
fix_details: Initial state for seekingGrowth and creativeExpression changed from '' to [] (line 533)
handleSubmit validates ALL questions before submission (lines 622-637)
handleSelectMulti simplified to always work with arrays (lines 612-620)
bug_2_all_questions_mandatory.test_result: PASS - All field types show appropriate validation errors

passed: STEP 0 - Welcome: Begin Your Journey button works
STEP 1 - Name: Validation 'This field is required to continue.' shown for empty field
STEP 1 - Name: Can proceed after entering name
STEP 2 - Phone: Validation works for empty/invalid phone
STEP 2 - Phone: Accepts valid Indian phone number (+919876543210)
STEP 5 - seekingGrowth: MULTI-SELECT validation 'Please select at least one option.' shown
STEP 5 - seekingGrowth: CAN PROCEED after selecting options - BUG FIX VERIFIED
STEP 6 - readyFor: TEXTAREA validation 'This field is required to continue.' shown
STEP 6 - readyFor: Can proceed after entering text
STEP 10 - creativeExpression: MULTI-SELECT validation 'Please select at least one option.' shown - MAIN BUG FIX VERIFIED
STEP 10 - creativeExpression: CAN PROCEED after selecting options - MAIN BUG FIX VERIFIED
STEP 11 - contact: Email and social media validation works
FORM SUBMISSION: Successfully submitted with 'You're on Your Way!' message displayed

validation_error_messages_verified.text_required: This field is required to continue.
validation_error_messages_verified.phone_invalid: Please enter a valid phone number for the selected country.
validation_error_messages_verified.single_select: Please select an option to continue.
validation_error_messages_verified.multi_select: Please select at least one option.
validation_error_messages_verified.textarea: This field is required to continue.
validation_error_messages_verified.contact_email: Please enter a valid email address.
validation_error_messages_verified.contact_social: Please provide at least one social media handle.

seed_data_creation: Created test submission via form: E2E Bug Test, bugtest@example.com, @bugtest
context_for_next_testing_agent: Both bug fixes verified working. The canProceed() function at line 650 now properly validates: 'multi' type (Array.isArray && length > 0), 'textarea' type (trim().length > 0). Questions array has 13 steps indexed 0-12: welcome(0), name(1), phone(2), whatBringsYou(3), currentPhase(4), seekingGrowth(5-multi), readyFor(6-textarea), showUpAs(7), timing(8), investment(9), creativeExpression(10-multi), contact(11), finalThought(12-textarea). All mandatory validations working correctly.

rca_of_issues.original_bug: Users could not proceed past creativeExpression (and seekingGrowth) multi-select steps
rca_of_issues.root_cause: canProceed() function was missing validation logic for 'multi' type questions. It only validated 'welcome', 'phone', 'text', 'single', and 'contact' types.
additional_fixes: Line 533: Changed initial state of seekingGrowth and creativeExpression from '' to []
Lines 622-637: handleSubmit now validates ALL questions before submission
Lines 612-620: handleSelectMulti simplified to always work with arrays
